CustomField.description: Internal engine field. Stores pipe-delimited 6-character tails (last 6 characters, via .right(6)) of each ancestor Metadata_Id__c value as a fast pre-screen index for cycle detection. Uses the auto-number suffix portion of the 18-char ID, which is unique per component - unlike the entity key prefix (left 6 chars) which is identical for all components of the same type. Before running the expensive full Ancestor_Path__c containment check, the engine checks this index. A match triggers the conclusive full-string check; no match skips it entirely. Do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Ancestor ID Shortkeys
